mapper.sql: id, user_b_id AS userBId, clean_type AS cleanType, car_type AS carType, original_price AS originalPrice, preferential_price AS preferentialPrice, thrie_price AS thriePrice, state, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM app_clean_price_detail WHERE user_b_id = #{userBId}
AND clean_type = #{cleanType}

SELECT DISTINCT a.user_b_id FROM app_clean_price_detail as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_b_user_config as c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE clean_type = #{cleanType} AND b.city = #{cityCode} AND c.business_type = 1 AND c.open_wash_time = 1 AND c.pass_free_carwash <> 1

SELECT DISTINCT a.user_b_id FROM app_clean_price_detail as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_b_user_config as c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE b.city = #{cityCode} AND c.business_type = 1 AND c.open_wash_time = 1 AND (manual_antomatic = 2 OR manual_antomatic = 3) AND c.pass_free_carwash <> 1

SELECT DISTINCT a.user_b_id FROM app_clean_price_detail as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_b_user_config as c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE b.city = #{cityCode} AND c.business_type = 1 AND c.open_wash_time = 1 AND night_wash = 1 AND c.pass_free_carwash <> 1

SELECT DISTINCT a.user_b_id FROM app_clean_price_detail as a LEFT JOIN app_b_user as b ON a.user_b_id = b.id LEFT JOIN app_b_user_config as c ON a.user_b_id = c.user_b_id WHERE clean_type = #{cleanType} AND b.city = #{cityCode} AND c.business_type = 1 AND c.open_wash_time = 1 AND pass_free_carwash = 1
select * from app_clean_price_detail t1 where t1.id=#{bussinessId} for update
select * from app_clean_price_detail WHERE clean_type =#{carType} AND car_type = #{carType} AND user_b_id = #{userBId} for update

SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN indent_state=1 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) waitReceiving, COUNT(CASE WHEN indent_state=2 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) inServiceing, COUNT(CASE WHEN indent_state=3 THEN 1 ELSE NULL END) toEvaluate FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_evaluation <> 1

SELECT id FROM app_clean_indet WHERE user_id = #{id} AND user_b_id = #{userBId} AND is_evaluation <> 1 union all SELECT id FROM app_spray_paint_indent WHERE user_id = #{id} AND user_b_id = #{userBId} AND (state = 3 or state =6)
